---
title: "Visualizing accessibility measures (*Census Tract* level)"
author: "Bruno Santos & Antonio Paez"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  tufte::tufte_html: default
  tufte::tufte_handout:
    citation_package: natbib
    latex_engine: xelatex
  tufte::tufte_book:
    citation_package: natbib
    latex_engine: xelatex
bibliography: skeleton.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r clean-workspace, include=FALSE}
# cleaning objects from the workspace 
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# layout configuration 
library(tufte)
library(knitr)
options(htmltools.dir.version = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Introduction

This Rmarkdown file is part of the
[**CommuteCA**](https://github.com/dias-bruno/CommuteCA) package.
This package was created in conjunction with the office of the
[*Research Data Center* at *McMaster
University*](https://rdc.mcmaster.ca/), the [*Sherman Centre for Digital
Scholarship*](https://scds.ca/) and the [*Mobilizing
Justice*](https://mobilizingjustice.ca/)[^1].

[^1]: The Mobilizing Justice project is a multidisciplinary and
    multi-sector collaboration with the objective of understand and
    address transportation poverty in Canada and to improve the
    well-being of Canadians at risk of transport poverty. The Social
    Sciences and Humanities Research Council (SSRHC) has provided
    funding for the project, which was created by an unprecedented
    alliance of academics from various Canadian provinces and
    institutions, transportation firms, and nonprofit organizations

The [**CommuteCA**](https://github.com/dias-bruno/CommuteCA) R
package was created to develop standardized methods for transport
analysis in research, particularly for analysis using the [*2021 Census of
Population*](https://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/index-eng.cfm) from Statistics Canada. We focused our efforts on the [_Commuting Reference Guide_](https://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2021/ref/98-500/011/98-500-x2021011-eng.cfm),
which provides valuable variables and information on commuting for the Canadian population aged 15 and older living in private households. 

After obtaining the accessibility measures for our study area, in this
`R` Markdown we will visualize the measure in form of maps.

## Suggested Readings

-   Soukhov, Anastasia, Antonio Paez, Christopher D Higgins, and Moataz
    Mohamed. 2023."Introducing Spatial Availability, a
    Singly-Constrained Measure of Competitive Accessibility." *Plos One*
    18 (1): e0278468.
-   Soukhov, A., Páez, A. (2024). Accessibility analysis for planning
    applications (Report No. MJ-A2-0002). Mobilizing Justice.
    <https://github.com/soukhova/MJ-Accessibility-Blogs>
-   Pereira, Rafael H. M.; Herszenhut, Daniel. Introduction to urban
    accessibility: a practical guide with R. Rio de Janeiro: Ipea, 2023.
    152 p. ISBN: 978-65-5635-065-3. DOI:
    <http://dx.doi.org/9786556350653>.
-   Soukhov A, Tarriño-Ortiz J, Soria-Lara JA, Páez A (2024) Multimodal
    spatial availability: A singly-constrained measure of accessibility
    considering multiple modes. PLoS ONE 19(2): e0299077.
    <https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0299077>

## Data

The data used in this R markdown is the output of the previous `R`
markdown, in which we calculated accessibility and spatial availability
for our study area. We will use the census tract (census_tracts) geometry,
available in this package, to plot maps of the study area.

# Let's code!

Load the packages:

```{r load-packages}
#library('CommuteCA') # Access data sets from CommuteCA R package
library(dplyr)# A Grammar of Data Manipulation 
library(ggplot2) # Create Elegant Data Visualizations Using the Grammar of Graphics
library(RColorBrewer) # color schemes for maps (and other graphics) designed
library(scales) # for scaling data
library(sf) # support for simple features, a standardized way to encode spatial vector data 
library(tmap) # thematic maps - version  "3.3-4"!!!
library(tidyr) # tidying data
library(readr) # Read csv files setting column data types
library('here') # enable easy file referencing in project-oriented workflows
library(ggspatial)
library(patchwork)
library(nngeo)
```

Setting the folder with the accessibility measures: 

```{r}
code <- "GTAH"
measures_folder <- paste0(here::here(),"/data-raw/output/", code, "/CT/accessibility-measures/")
```


```{r reading-tables}
HT_mode <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "HT_mode.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  from_id = col_character()))

HT <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "HT_general.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  from_id = col_character()))

SA_mode <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "SA_mode.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  from_id = col_character()))

SA_pp <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "SA_pp_long.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  from_id = col_character()))

SA <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "SA_general.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  from_id = col_character()))

land_use_mode <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "land_use_mode.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  CTUID = col_character()))

land_use_general <- read_csv(paste0(measures_folder, "land_use_general.csv"),
                col_types = cols(
                  CTUID = col_character()))
```

Reading the census_tracts geometries:

```{r}
directory_spatial_files <- paste0(here(), "/data-raw/output/GTAH/spatial-files/") # Update this address if necessary
census_tracts <-   st_read(paste0(directory_spatial_files, "census_tracts.shp"))
census_tracts <- nngeo::st_remove_holes(census_tracts)
```

Reading the census_divisions geometries:
```{r}
census_divisions_raw <-   st_read(paste0(directory_spatial_files, "census_divisions.shp"))

census_divisions <- nngeo::st_remove_holes(census_divisions_raw)
```

Merging the census_tracts with the accessibility measures tables:

```{r}
names(census_tracts)[1] <- "CTUID"

mode_metrics_ct <- 
  expand.grid(CTUID = unique(census_tracts$CTUID), 
              PwMode_label = unique(HT_mode$PwMode_label)) %>%
  left_join(census_tracts, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(HT_mode, by = c("CTUID" = "from_id", "PwMode_label" = "PwMode_label")) %>%
  left_join(SA_mode, by = c("CTUID" = "from_id", "PwMode_label" = "PwMode_label")) %>% 
  left_join(land_use_mode[,c("CTUID","PwMode")], by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID", "PwMode_label" = "PwMode"))

# mode_metrics_ct[is.na(mode_metrics_ct$HT_im),]$HT_im <- 0
# mode_metrics_ct[is.na(mode_metrics_ct$SA_im),]$SA_im <- 0
# mode_metrics_ct[is.na(mode_metrics_ct$labour_force),]$labour_force <- 0

mode_metrics_ct <- mode_metrics_ct %>% 
  mutate(SA_im_pp = SA_im/labour_force, 
         SA_im_pp = ifelse(is.nan(SA_im_pp), 0, SA_im_pp))

mode_metrics_ct_sf <- st_as_sf(mode_metrics_ct, crs = st_crs(census_tracts))
```

Preparing the tables to plot the maps:

```{r}
# Hansen
HT_metrics_ct <- census_tracts %>% 
  full_join(HT, by = c("CTUID" = "from_id")) %>%
  full_join(land_use_general[,c("CTUID", "labour_force", "jobs")], by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID")) 

# HT_metrics_ct$HT_i <- ifelse(is.na(HT_metrics_ct$HT_i), 0, HT_metrics_ct$HT_i)
# HT_metrics_ct$labour_force <- ifelse(is.na(HT_metrics_ct$labour_force), 0, HT_metrics_ct$labour_force)
# HT_metrics_ct$jobs <- ifelse(is.na(HT_metrics_ct$jobs), 0, HT_metrics_ct$jobs)

# Spatial Availability
SA_metrics_ct <- census_tracts %>% 
  full_join(SA, by = c("CTUID" = "from_id")) %>%
  full_join(land_use_general[,c("CTUID","jobs")], by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID"))

# SA_metrics_ct$SA_i <- ifelse(is.na(SA_metrics_ct$SA_i), 0, SA_metrics_ct$SA_i)
# SA_metrics_ct$labour_force <- ifelse(is.na(SA_metrics_ct$labour_force), 0, SA_metrics_ct$labour_force)
# SA_metrics_ct$jobs <- ifelse(is.na(SA_metrics_ct$jobs), 0, SA_metrics_ct$jobs)
```

## Visualizing the accessibility measures with maps

Creating a directory to export the figures:

```{r directory-export}
diretorio_export_figures <- paste0(here(),"/data-raw/output/GTAH/CT/accessibility-figures/") # Update the address to export the data, if necessary

if(!dir.exists(diretorio_export_figures)){
  dir.create(diretorio_export_figures, recursive = TRUE)}
```

Plotting the count of people within the labour force and count of job
opportunities in each census_tracts:

```{r}
SA_metrics_ct <- SA_metrics_ct %>% 
  mutate(lf_km = labour_force/LANDAREA, 
         jobs_km = jobs/LANDAREA)
  
labour_force_plot <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("labour_force",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Reds",
              title = "Legend",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = "left",
            panel.labels = "Labour force")

labour_force_km_plot <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("lf_km",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Reds",
              title = "Legend",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = "left",
            panel.labels = "Labour force per km²")

jobs_plot <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("jobs",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Blues",
              title = "Legend",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = "left",
            panel.labels = "Job opportunities")

jobs_per_km_plot <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("jobs_km",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Blues",
              title = "Legend",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = "left",
            panel.labels = "Jobs per km²")

lf_jobs_CT <- tmap_arrange(labour_force_plot, labour_force_km_plot, 
                           jobs_plot, jobs_per_km_plot, ncol = 2)

tmap_save(lf_jobs_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"lf_jobs_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 15, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

lf_jobs_CT_densities <- tmap_arrange(labour_force_km_plot, jobs_per_km_plot, ncol = 2)

tmap_save(lf_jobs_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"lf_jobs_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 15, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

tmap_save(lf_jobs_CT_densities, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"lf_jobs_CT_densities.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height = 8, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"/lf_jobs_CT.jpg"))
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"/lf_jobs_CT_densities.jpg"))
```


Plotting the accessibility measures:

```{r}
ht_plot <- tm_shape(HT_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("HT_i",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Purples",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("left","top"),
            panel.labels = "Hansen-type accessibility of jobs")

sa_plot <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_i",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("left","top"),
            panel.labels = "Spatial availability of jobs")

HT_SA_CT <- tmap_arrange(ht_plot, sa_plot, ncol = 2)

tmap_save(HT_SA_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"HT_SA_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 15, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"/HT_SA_CT.jpg"))
```

```{r}
sa_nonc_plot <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_nonc_i",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Greens",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("left","top"),
            panel.labels = "Spatial availability (Non-competitive)")

HT_SA_SANONC_CT <- tmap_arrange(ht_plot, sa_plot, sa_nonc_plot, ncol = 3)

tmap_save(HT_SA_SANONC_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"HT_SA_SANONC_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"/HT_SA_SANONC_CT.jpg"))
```

Plotting the jobs per labour force, and the spatial availability per
labour force:

```{r}
HT_metrics_ct$jobs_per_lf <-  HT_metrics_ct$jobs / HT_metrics_ct$labour_force

HT_metrics_ct <- HT_metrics_ct %>%
  mutate(jobs_per_lf = case_when(
    jobs == 0 & labour_force == 0 ~ 0,
    labour_force == 0 & jobs != 0 ~ jobs,  
    TRUE ~ jobs_per_lf))

jobs_per_labour_force <- tm_shape(HT_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("jobs_per_lf",
              style = "fixed",
              breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1, 5, 10, 15, 20, Inf),
              #breaks = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 100, 200, Inf),
              palette = "RdYlGn",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("left", "bottom"),
            panel.labels = "Jobs per person")

SA_metrics_ct$SA_per_lf <- SA_metrics_ct$SA_i / SA_metrics_ct$labour_force

SA_metrics_ct <- SA_metrics_ct %>%
  mutate(SA_per_lf = case_when(
    jobs == 0 & labour_force == 0 ~ 0,
    labour_force == 0 & jobs != 0 ~ jobs,  
    TRUE ~ SA_per_lf))

SA_per_labour_force <- tm_shape(SA_metrics_ct) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_per_lf",
              style = "fixed",
              breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1, 5, 10, 15, 20, Inf),
              #breaks = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 100, 200, Inf),
              palette = "RdYlGn",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("left", "bottom"),
            panel.labels = "Spatial availability per person")

jobs_SA_per_lf_CT <- tmap_arrange(jobs_per_labour_force, SA_per_labour_force, ncol = 2)


tmap_save(jobs_SA_per_lf_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"jobs_SA_per_lf_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 8, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"/jobs_SA_per_lf_CT.jpg"))
```

## Visualizing the accessibility measures by transportation modes with maps

Visualizing the total labour force by transportation mode:

```{r}
total_pop_by_mode_CT <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("labour_force",
              style = "cont",
              palette = "Reds",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) +  
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom")) +
   tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1.0) + 
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(total_pop_by_mode_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"total_pop_by_mode_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

total_pop_by_mode_CT
```

```{r}
total_pop_by_mode_CT_2 <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("labour_force",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Reds",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) +  
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom")) +
   tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1.0) + 
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(total_pop_by_mode_CT_2, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"total_pop_by_mode_CT_2.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

total_pop_by_mode_CT_2
```

```{r}
mode_metrics_ct_sf <- mode_metrics_ct_sf %>% 
  mutate(lf_pp = labour_force/LANDAREA)


pop_dens_by_mode_CT_2 <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("lf_pp",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Reds",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) +  
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom")) +
   tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1.0) + 
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(pop_dens_by_mode_CT_2, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"pop_dens_by_mode_CT_2.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

pop_dens_by_mode_CT_2
```

Visualizing the Hansen-type accessibility by transportation mode:

```{r}
HT_by_mode_CT <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("HT_im",
              style = "cont",
              palette = "Purples",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(HT_by_mode_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"HT_by_mode_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

HT_by_mode_CT
```

Visualizing the Spatial Availability by transportation mode:

```{r}
SA_by_mode_CT <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_im",
              style = "cont",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(SA_by_mode_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_by_mode_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

SA_by_mode_CT
```

```{r}
SA_nonc_by_mode_CT <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_nonc_im",
              style = "cont",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(SA_nonc_by_mode_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_nonc_by_mode_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

SA_nonc_by_mode_CT
```

```{r}
SA_by_mode_CT_2 <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_im",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = "Jobs accessible",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "top"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2, free.scales = TRUE) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
    tm_layout(legend.outside = FALSE,
            legend.position = c("right", "bottom"))

tmap_save(SA_by_mode_CT_2, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_by_mode_CT_2.jpg"), 
          width = 25, 
          height = 22, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

SA_by_mode_CT_2
```

```{r}
SA_per_person_by_mode_CT_2 <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_im_pp",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "top"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2, free.scales = TRUE) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
    tm_layout(legend.outside = FALSE,
            legend.position = c("right", "bottom"))

tmap_save(SA_per_person_by_mode_CT_2, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_per_person_by_mode_CT_2.jpg"), 
          width = 25, 
          height = 22, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

SA_per_person_by_mode_CT_2
```

```{r}
SA_per_person_by_mode_CT <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_im_pp",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5)

tmap_save(SA_per_person_by_mode_CT, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_per_person_by_mode_CT.jpg"), 
          width = 20, 
          height = 20, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

SA_per_person_by_mode_CT
```

```{r}
SA_nonc_by_mode_CT_2 <- tm_shape(mode_metrics_ct_sf) + 
   tm_polygons("SA_nonc_im",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = " ",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"))+
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "bottom"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 2, free.scales = TRUE) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
    tm_layout(legend.outside = FALSE,
            legend.outside.position = c("right", "bottom"))

tmap_save(SA_nonc_by_mode_CT_2, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_nonc_by_mode_CT_2.jpg"), 
          width = 25, 
          height = 22, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)

SA_nonc_by_mode_CT_2
```

## SA per person 

```{r}
SA_pp <- SA_pp %>%
  rename(CTUID = from_id, SA_pp_im = SA_pp)

mode_pp_metrics_ct <- 
  expand.grid(CTUID = unique(census_tracts$CTUID), 
              PwMode_label = unique(SA_pp$PwMode_label)) %>%
  left_join(census_tracts, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(SA_pp, by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID", "PwMode_label" = "PwMode_label")) %>% 
  mutate(SA_pp_im = ifelse(is.nan(SA_pp_im), 0, SA_pp_im))

mode_pp_metrics_ct_sf <- st_as_sf(mode_pp_metrics_ct, crs = st_crs(census_tracts))

SA_pp_3modes <- mode_pp_metrics_ct_sf %>% 
  filter(PwMode_label %in% c("Active", "Transit", "Car-motor")) %>%
  tm_shape() + 
   tm_polygons("SA_pp_im",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = "Job SA per person",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 3, free.scales = TRUE) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
    tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("right", "bottom"))

tmap_save(SA_pp_3modes, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_pp_3modes.jpg"), 
          width = 25, 
          height = 14, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
SA_pp_3modes_v2 <- mode_pp_metrics_ct_sf %>% 
  filter(PwMode_label %in% c("Active", "Transit", "Car-motor")) %>%
  tm_shape() + 
   tm_polygons("SA_pp_im",
              style = "quantile",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = "Spatial availability per person",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=0.5)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 3) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
   tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE, 
            legend.outside.position = c("right", "top"))  

tmap_save(SA_pp_3modes_v2, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_pp_3modes_v2.jpg"), 
          width = 14,
          height = 10,
          units = "cm",
          dpi = 300)

# For paper 
tmap_save(SA_pp_3modes_v2, 
          paste0(paste0(here::here(),"/manuscript/figures/SA_pp_3modes_v2.jpg")), 
          width = 14,
          height = 10,
          units = "cm",
          dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"/SA_pp_3modes_v2.jpg"))
```

```{r}
SA_pp_4modes <- mode_pp_metrics_ct_sf %>% 
  filter(PwMode_label %in% c("Walk", "Bike", "Transit", "Car-motor")) %>%
  tm_shape() + 
   tm_polygons("SA_pp_im",
              style = "jenks",
              palette = "Oranges",
              title = "Job SA per person",
              border.col = NULL) + 
  tm_scale_bar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size=1.0)  + 
   tm_facets(by = "PwMode_label", ncol = 4, free.scales = TRUE) +       
   tm_shape(census_divisions) +
   tm_borders("black", lwd=0.5) +
    tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.outside.position = c("right", "bottom"))


tmap_save(SA_pp_4modes, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"SA_pp_4modes.jpg"), 
          width = 25, 
          height = 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

Computing of the labour force by transportation mode:

```{r}
total_pop <- sum(land_use_mode$labour_force)
total_SA <- sum(mode_metrics_ct$SA_im, na.rm = TRUE)

modal_SA_percents <- mode_metrics_ct %>% 
  group_by(PwMode_label) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(total_labour_fource = sum(labour_force, na.rm = TRUE),
            SA_meam = mean(SA_im, na.rm = TRUE),
            SA_sum = sum(SA_im, na.rm = TRUE),
            perc_SA = sum(SA_im, na.rm = TRUE)/total_SA, 
            perc_pop= sum(labour_force, na.rm = TRUE)/total_pop)

modal_SA_long <- modal_SA_percents %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(perc_SA, perc_pop), names_to = "perc", values_to = "measure")
```

Visualizing the share of labour force and spatial availability by
transportation mode:

```{r}
Pop_SA_by_mode_CT <- ggplot(modal_SA_long, 
      aes(x = perc, y = measure, fill = PwMode_label, label = measure %>% percent(accuracy = 0.1))) +
      scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
      "perc_SA" = paste("Spatial Availability\n by Mode\n(Total: ", round(total_SA), ")"),
      "perc_pop" = paste("Population\n by Mode\n(Total: ", format(round(total_pop)), ")") )) +
  geom_col() + 
  geom_text(position = position_stack(vjust=0.5), color="black") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color="black"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank())

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_figures,"Pop_SA_by_mode_CT.jpg"), 
       plot = Pop_SA_by_mode_CT,
       width = 10, 
       height = 10, 
       units = "cm", 
       dpi = 300)

# For paper 
tmap_save(Pop_SA_by_mode_CT, 
          paste0(paste0(here::here(),"/manuscript/figures/modal_SA_long.jpg")), 
          width = 10,
          height = 10,
          units = "cm",
          dpi = 300)

Pop_SA_by_mode_CT
```
